title: RunState snapshot — protocol 1.0.0
description: Protocol-level shape of `state.json` written by the v6 run-state engine. The internal `schema_version` integer (v6/v7 wire format) is a separate concern owned by `RUN_STATE_SCHEMA_VERSION` in `src/core/run-state/types.ts`. `protocol_version` is the outer envelope used for ecosystem-level forward-compat. `additionalProperties: true` because the engine evolves more rapidly than the protocol — only the keys explicitly listed are protocol-stable.

protocol_version.description: Cadence protocol version this state.json conforms to.

schema_version.description: Internal v6 engine wire-format version (v6=1, v7=2). Not the same as protocol_version.
